data.title: Webuy Global Closes US$1 Million Private Placement, Issuing 23% New Class A Shares
data.description:

Webuy Global ( (WBUY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Webuy Global Ltd has completed a previously announced private placement of its Class A ordinary shares to investor Zheng Mingjie, bolstering its capital base through a negotiated pricing mechanism tied to recent Nasdaq trading levels. The transaction, structured as a PIPE financing, underscores the company’s continued use of U.S. capital markets to support its operations and shareholder base.

On March 13, 2026, Webuy Global received the remaining US$400,000 of a US$1,000,000 purchase price, and the private placement formally closed on March 24, 2026. At a calculated price of US$0.8776 per share, the company issued 1,139,472 Class A shares, representing about 23.24% of its outstanding Class A stock as of the filing date, in an unregistered offering under U.S. securities law exemptions.

The most recent analyst rating on (WBUY) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Webuy Global stock, see the WBUY Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WBUY is a Underperform.

Webuy Global’s overall stock score is primarily impacted by its poor financial performance, characterized by high leverage, negative cash flow, and operational inefficiencies. Technical indicators provide mixed signals, and the negative P/E ratio highlights valuation concerns. The absence of earnings call and corporate events data limits further insights.

To see Spark’s full report on WBUY stock, click here.

More about Webuy Global

Webuy Global Ltd is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market, with principal executive offices in Singapore. The company’s listed securities include Class A ordinary shares, which are the subject of recent capital-raising transactions disclosed to U.S. investors.

data.title: Pattern S.p.A. Calls 2026 Shareholders’ Meeting With Dividend and Board on Agenda
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pattern S.P.A ( (IT:PTR) ) has issued an announcement.

Pattern S.p.A. has published the notice convening its Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting, scheduled on first call for 20 April 2026 and, if needed, on second call for 27 April 2026, at its registered office in Collegno. The agenda includes approval of the 2025 financial statements, allocation of profit, a proposal to distribute an extraordinary dividend, renewal of the Board of Directors with related remuneration decisions, and a new authorization to buy and dispose of treasury shares.

The notice details the company’s current share capital structure and confirms that each ordinary share carries one vote, with no treasury shares presently held. Participation and voting will occur exclusively through a designated representative, Computershare S.p.A., with strict record dates, proxy submission deadlines and procedures, underlining a controlled governance framework aimed at orderly shareholder engagement and potentially signaling attention to capital structure flexibility and shareholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:PTR) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pattern S.P.A stock, see the IT:PTR Stock Forecast page.

More about Pattern S.P.A

Pattern S.p.A., listed on Euronext Growth Milan, is an Italian company specializing in the design, development and production of clothing lines for top-of-the-range fashion brands. Founded in 2000 and headquartered near Turin, it operates as a key industrial partner for premium and luxury labels seeking high-end manufacturing and product development capabilities.

Average Trading Volume: 6,110

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €42.04M

data.title: Atlantic International Challenges Creditor Default Claims in Court
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Atlantic International ( (ATLN) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 30, 2026, SPP Credit Advisors issued default notices to Atlantic International and its Lyneer subsidiaries under both an April 29, 2025 term loan agreement and a June 18, 2024 bridge loan, alleging breaches of financial and non-financial covenants. SPP reserved broad enforcement rights, attempted to exercise its collateral pledges and sought to replace Lyneer’s management, moves that Atlantic is contesting as baseless defaults designed to seize control of the Lyneer businesses.

Atlantic and the Lyneer subsidiaries responded on April 1, 2026 by filing suit in New York state court, seeking a temporary restraining order and preliminary injunction to block SPP from asserting management control, seizing assets or exercising loan remedies, arguing that SPP’s debt had been satisfied by over $77 million of Atlantic stock collateral and that its actions amount to a hostile takeover. The dispute has been further complicated by the March 30, 2026 resignation and for-cause termination of Chief Operating Officer Mathew Evelt, whom Atlantic accuses of egregious misconduct and of siding with SPP, raising governance concerns and legal uncertainty for lenders, shareholders and employees as the litigation proceeds.

The most recent analyst rating on (ATLN) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Atlantic International stock, see the ATLN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ATLN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ATLN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial health—loss-making operations and a highly concerning balance sheet with negative equity—despite strong revenue growth. Technicals are supportive with strong upward momentum above major moving averages, and corporate events are positive (acquisition and new CFO), but valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ATLN stock, click here.

More about Atlantic International

Atlantic International Corp. operates through its Lyneer subsidiaries, including Lyneer Investments, Lyneer Holdings and Lyneer Staffing Solutions, which focus on staffing and workforce solutions. The group’s financing structure includes a term loan and a bridge loan provided by SPP Credit Advisors, secured in part by pledges over the ownership and governance rights of the Lyneer entities.

Average Trading Volume: 163,434

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $219.8M

For a thorough assessment of ATLN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Galera Therapeutics ( (GRTX) ) has issued an update.

Galera Therapeutics has scheduled its combined 2025 and 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders for May 8, 2026, after its 2024 annual meeting was held on February 24, 2025, and is updating key deadlines for shareholder participation as a result of the later date. The company has set April 13, 2026 as the cutoff for shareholders to submit director nominations, other proposals under its bylaws or universal proxy rules, and for proposals to be considered for inclusion in its proxy materials, providing a clear timetable for investors seeking to influence board composition or agenda items at the meeting.

These revised deadlines underscore the company’s adherence to Exchange Act and universal proxy requirements while signaling to shareholders the procedural steps needed to exercise their governance rights. The clarified timeline may affect how active and institutional investors plan engagement, proxy campaigns, or governance initiatives ahead of the 2026 combined meeting.

data.title: MEDIA DO Says Hikari Tsushin Loses Affiliated Company Status After Stake Falls Below 20%
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

MEDIA DO Co., Ltd. ( (JP:3678) ) just unveiled an update.

MEDIA DO Co., Ltd. disclosed that Hikari Tsushin, Inc. qualified as a controlling shareholder as of February 28, 2026, through indirect holdings amounting to 20.42% of its voting rights via several subsidiaries. The company emphasized that there are no material business or personnel relationships with Hikari Tsushin, Inc., and that its management decisions are made independently, preserving a degree of operational autonomy.

Following a subsequent reduction in Hikari Tsushin, Inc.’s indirect stake, MEDIA DO confirmed that the investor’s voting rights fell below the 20% threshold to 19.39% as of March 27, 2026. As a result, Hikari Tsushin, Inc. is no longer classified as an “other affiliated company,” signaling a slight easing of concentrated ownership and potentially reinforcing MEDIA DO’s governance independence and flexibility toward existing and future stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:3678) stock is a Hold with a Yen1693.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MEDIA DO Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:3678 Stock Forecast page.

More about MEDIA DO Co., Ltd.

MEDIA DO Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based company listed on the TSE Prime that operates in the digital content and distribution sector, focusing on e-books and related platforms. The company maintains an independent management stance despite having significant institutional shareholders and positions itself as a neutral player without material business or personnel ties to major shareholders such as Hikari Tsushin, Inc.

Average Trading Volume: 64,463

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen24.05B

Harmonychain AS ( (DE:7EW) ) has provided an update.

Primary insider Ståle Flataker has transferred 263,012 subscription rights in Lokotech Group AS from his personal holdings to his wholly owned company BFS Invest AS at a price of NOK 0.26 per right. Following the internal transaction, Flataker and his related parties continue to hold 10,540,317 shares and 1,175,050 subscription rights in total, leaving his overall ownership position in the company unchanged.

The move is essentially an internal reorganization of Flataker’s holdings between closely associated entities rather than a change in economic exposure to Lokotech. The announcement, made in line with disclosure obligations under the Securities Trading Act and MAR, signals that there is no shift in control or insider confidence, but it maintains transparency for investors regarding insider-related transactions.

More about Harmonychain AS

Lokotech Group AS, listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker LOKOS, operates within the technology and digital asset infrastructure segment. The company’s shareholder base includes primary insiders and related investment entities, reflecting an ownership structure where key individuals often hold stakes both directly and through wholly owned companies.

data.title: HEG sets May meetings for NCLT-driven restructuring scheme
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

HEG Limited ( (IN:HEG) ) has shared an announcement.

HEG Limited has notified stock exchanges that, pursuant to directions from the National Company Law Tribunal’s Indore Bench, separate meetings of its equity shareholders, secured creditors and unsecured creditors will be held on 5 May 2026 via video conferencing or other audio-visual means. These meetings relate to a proposed Scheme of Arrangement involving HEG Limited as demerged and transferee company, HEG Graphite Limited as the resulting company, and Bhilwara Energy Limited as transferor company, marking a significant corporate restructuring step that could reshape the group’s business structure and creditor-shareholder alignments.

The company has also published notices and e-voting information in national and regional newspapers in English and Hindi to ensure broad stakeholder awareness and participation in the NCLT-directed process. Successful approval of the scheme by stakeholders and subsequent legal clearances may have material implications for HEG’s corporate organization, potentially influencing its operational focus, capital structure and long-term positioning within the graphite and energy-linked industries.

More about HEG Limited

HEG Limited is an India-based company engaged in the graphite and related materials business, with its equity shares listed on BSE and the National Stock Exchange. The company operates within the broader industrial and energy-linked sectors through its associations with entities such as HEG Graphite Limited and Bhilwara Energy Limited, reflecting a focus on graphite products and energy-oriented ventures.

Average Trading Volume: 200,427

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: 108.9B INR

DB (International) Stock Brokers Limited ( (IN:DBSTOCKBRO) ) has provided an update.

DB (International) Stock Brokers Limited has reported that it has obtained a confirmation certificate under Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the fourth quarter and full financial year ended March 31, 2026. The certificate, issued by its registrar and transfer agent Abhipra Capital Limited, confirms that all securities received for dematerialization during the quarter were properly processed, listed on the relevant stock exchanges, and that physical certificates were cancelled and the depositories recorded as registered owners within the stipulated timelines, underscoring the broker’s compliance with key regulatory and operational requirements for investors.

data.title: MCJ Buyout Bidder Declares Final Tender Offer Price at 2,200 Yen
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

MCJ Co., Ltd. ( (JP:6670) ) has issued an announcement.

BCPE Meta Cayman, L.P. has launched a tender offer to take MCJ Co., Ltd. private via a management buyout, offering 2,200 yen per share for all common shares. The offer period, which began on February 6, 2026, was extended to April 7, 2026 to give shareholders more time to decide whether to tender their shares.

The bidder has now stated it considers 2,200 yen to be its highest and final price, with no intention to raise it or further extend the offer period absent legal requirements. MCJ’s board and its special committee have deemed the price fair, noting it was set after extensive negotiations and includes a significant premium over recent market prices, positioning the offer as a compelling liquidity opportunity for shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:6670) stock is a Buy with a Yen2680.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MCJ Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:6670 Stock Forecast page.

More about MCJ Co., Ltd.

MCJ Co., Ltd. is a Japanese company listed on the Standard Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange under securities code 6670. The company is currently the subject of a management buyout initiative led by investment fund BCPE Meta Cayman, L.P., which is seeking to take MCJ private through a tender offer for its common shares.

data.title: Japan Hotel REIT Cancels Planned Third-Party Allotment of New Units
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Japan Hotel Reit Investment ( (JP:8985) ).

Japan Hotel REIT Investment Corporation announced that the planned issuance of new investment units by way of third-party allotment will not proceed, after the designated domestic underwriter notified the company it would not subscribe to any of the 38,709 units. As a result, no new units will be issued under this scheme, and the total number of outstanding investment units remains at 5,904,006, limiting the capital-raising impact to the previously executed public and secondary offerings.

The cancelled third-party allotment, which had an expected total paid-in amount of approximately ¥2.96 billion, would have supplemented funds raised through the public offering and over-allotment. Its termination suggests that additional equity financing via this route will not dilute existing unitholders at this time, while also signaling that JHR may need to rely on other funding sources or retained capital for future hotel investment and growth plans.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:8985) stock is a Hold with a Yen85946.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Japan Hotel Reit Investment stock, see the JP:8985 Stock Forecast page.

More about Japan Hotel Reit Investment

Japan Hotel REIT Investment Corporation is a Japanese real estate investment trust focused on hotel assets, listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under code 8985. Managed by Japan Hotel REIT Advisors Co., Ltd., the trust invests in and operates a portfolio of hotel properties, providing investors with exposure to Japan’s lodging and hospitality market.

Average Trading Volume: 43,413

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen452.2B
